issues.description: Missing condition that limits Rest target to Characters with cost ≤ total of both players' Life cards. Current DSL has no cost comparison logic.
Target should specify 'up to 1' with cost restriction. ChooseOpponentCharacter lacks the cost constraint condition.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and 'Always' condition with PlaySelf action is spurious and not supported by card text. Should be removed.
Action type 'Rest' is correct, but the cost-based filtering condition is entirely missing from the DSL structure.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the total of your and your opponent's Life cards.
